---
name: Experiment proposal
about: Propose a new experiment for the lab
title: "[experiment] <operation>-<question>-<handle>"
labels: experiment
---

## Question

What question does this experiment answer? State it before describing any method.

## Place in the taxonomy

- Operation (salience / selection / compression / temporal / forgetting / attention budget / robustness):
- Question family (existence / comparison / boundary / mechanism / robustness):
- How does this differ from existing experiments in the same cell?

## Hypothesis

What do you expect to find, and why?

## Method sketch

- Strategy/strategies under test:
- Baseline(s):
- Benchmark / task:
- Budget range:
- Primary metric(s):

## Threats to validity

What could make the result misleading (shortcuts, leakage, construct validity)?

## Definition of done

Confirm this proposal can meet [docs/definition-of-done.md](../../docs/definition-of-done.md).
